summary: Completed testing of Expo Push Notifications system. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Push token registration and removal endpoints work correctly. Frontend: App loads without errors after adding usePushNotifications hook. Login flow works. Home screen renders correctly. Favor detail page loads without crash.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - React Native Web warning (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ POST /api/push-token - Registers push token correctly, requires auth, returns 'Push token registrato'
✅ DELETE /api/push-token - Removes push token correctly, requires auth, returns 'Push token rimosso'
✅ Push token stored in user document in MongoDB (push_token field)
✅ Push notification calls implemented in: accept_favor, complete_favor, submit_review, send_chat_message, create_skill_match_notifications
✅ send_push_notification function sends to Expo Push API (https://exp.host/--/api/v2/push/send)
✅ usePushNotifications hook skips registration on web (Platform.OS === 'web' check at line 19)
✅ Home screen loads correctly after adding push notification hook
✅ Login flow works with test credentials (reviewer@test.com / review123)
✅ Favor detail page loads without crash - shows status, type, category, granelli, duration, creator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notifications are MOCKED for web/emulator testing - actual delivery only works on physical devices with valid Expo push tokens. The Expo Push API will return 'DeviceNotRegistered' for test tokens, which is expected behavior. Backend endpoints POST/DELETE /api/push-token work correctly. The usePushNotifications hook correctly skips registration on web platform. All core app features (login, home, favor detail) work correctly after adding the push notification system.

POST /api/favors/accept.triggers_push: Sends push notification to favor creator

POST /api/favors/complete.triggers_push: Sends push notifications to both helper and receiver

POST /api/reviews.triggers_push: Sends push notification to reviewed user

POST /api/messages.triggers_push: Sends push notification to message recipient

ui_verification.login_page: Working - email/password inputs, Accedi button, Google/Apple OAuth buttons
ui_verification.home_screen: Working - greeting 'Ciao, App!', filters, category chips, favor cards, bottom nav
ui_verification.favor_detail_page: Working - shows status, type, category, granelli, duration, creator info
ui_verification.push_hook_on_web: Working - gracefully skips registration on web platform

push_notification_note: Push notifications are MOCKED for web/emulator testing. Actual push delivery only works on physical devices with valid Expo push tokens. Backend stores tokens and sends to Expo Push API correctly.
